name: Customer Testimonial
description: Template for customer testimonial and case study videos

intro.content: Introduce the customer and their situation

challenge.content: Describe the problem they were facing

exampleScript: Hi, I'm [name] from [company]. Before using [product], we struggled with [problem]. Everything changed when we found [product]. Within [timeframe], we saw [specific result]. The team at [company] was incredible to work with. I highly recommend [product] to anyone looking to [benefit].
